description: APS governance receipt artifact — a signed record that a specific action was executed under a specific delegation by an AgentID-identified agent. References both the delegationId (from delegation.json) and the AgentID credential hash (from README.json). Completes the identity + authorization + receipt audit chain.

credentialRefs.note: References the AgentID credential hash published in fixtures/aps/README.json. A verifier can check the hash against the AgentID attestation payload to confirm identity-authorization binding.

verification.note: Signature is over the JCS-canonicalized receipt payload minus the signature field itself. Independently verifiable with any Ed25519 library against the last delegationChain public key (the executing agent).

identity_step.question: Who is this agent?
identity_step.result: agent_interop_test_001 bound to Ed25519 key 207a067892821e25d770f1fba0c47c11ff4b813e54162ece9eb839e076231ab6, trust level L2 verified

authorization_step.question: What may this agent do?
authorization_step.result: Delegation permits data:read and api:get, spend cap 10000 USD, valid 2026-04-07 through 2026-04-08

execution_step.question: What did this agent actually do?
execution_step.result: data:read on customer-db executed successfully, 42 rows returned
